message:
feat(tests): add 36 property tests for version_check, terminal_images, and session_picker

version_check (12): semver irreflexivity, asymmetry, transitivity, v-prefix
transparency, pre-release stripping, garbage rejection, GitHub release JSON
parsing, cache round-trips, major bump detection, two-component defaults.

terminal_images (14): kitty APC bookends, chunk count, first-chunk action,
iTerm2 format invariants, placeholder dimension inclusion/omission, PNG/GIF
dimension round-trips, unknown format rejection, render_inline panic-freedom,
render_inline PNG dimensions, MIME label preservation, SOF marker classification.

session_picker (13): truncate limit, prefix, identity, zero, unicode,
idempotence, format_time panic-freedom, valid RFC3339 formatting and
fixed-width, invalid passthrough, is_session_file_path accept/reject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
